description.en: Mastercard project: Scalable Azure DevOps pipelines for Spring/Angular applications. Automated testing, deployment, and monitoring integration.
description.pt: Projeto Mastercard: Pipelines Azure DevOps escaláveis para aplicações Spring/Angular. Testes automatizados, deployment e integração de monitoramento.
description.fr: Projet Mastercard: Pipelines Azure DevOps évolutives pour applications Spring/Angular. Tests automatisés, déploiement et intégration de monitoring.
